findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "axiorank_score_tool_call" references sensitive artifacts (secret). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Inspect a proposed agent tool call BEFORE executing it. AxioRank scores its risk (0–100), runs content inspection (secrets, PII, destructive ops, prompt-injecti…

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "axiorank_list_agents" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: List the active agents in your AxioRank workspace (id, name, labels, quarantine + last-used status). Use this to find an agent's id before calling agent-specifi…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
